postTitle: We have our very own website now!
postBodyPreview: 14d  • The Hero's Journey 🗺️We have our very own website now! I'm really happy to announce that today we built our very own website and we have two more new AMAZING acquisitions in our company, Answer 42.Here's the website, boys, check it out:https://answer42.llc/
reply:
This is how empires start, brother. Clean. Powerful. Alive.

Website looks fire. Now the real wave begins. Let’s go.

postBodyPreview: 15d  • Mindset 🧠Weekly Sync 🧘🏼‍♀️I’ve learned most of all this week that we have to actually schedule our rest. If we don't plan the downtime, our nervous systems will eventually schedule a burnout for us.​What is the #1 non-negotiable staying on your schedule for next week?
reply:
Brother that hit.

If rest is not on the calendar, burnout will put itself there real quick.

My non negotiable next week is space to breathe. Training, a little silence, and getting around good people in real life. That last one matters more than most men admit.

postTitle: 🚨Community call: Goal Setting and the Nature of Aim👁️
postBodyPreview: 23d  • The Hero's Journey 🗺️🚨Community call: Goal Setting and the Nature of Aim👁️Here's the example post and resource so you can copy it into a google doc and replace my goals and answers with your own.Don't skip this, do it and next week we'll review the answers and we'll be using all of this to
reply:
Love that, Lea.

That’s exactly how it hits when you actually do the work. Stuff rises up. Truth gets exposed. And that’s where the real shift starts.

Proud of you for leaning in, sister. Keep going. This is where lives change.

postBodyPreview: 14d  • Mindset 🧠The Performance Test 🪄I’m moving out of theory today and straight into the field. All the notes on deep work and scheduled rest from this week are officially becoming my new daily baseline. Knowing the strategy is one thing, actually running the system under pressure is where the r
reply:
Love this, Lea.

That right there is the real test, brother. Not what sounds good on paper. What survives pressure.

Biggest challenge for me is staying locked in after the novelty wears off. First few days feel powerful. Then life swings. That’s when the standard gets revealed.

You’re doing it the right way. Run the system. Adjust in real time. Keep going.

postBodyPreview: 2d  • General 💭Who are you, really?It’s wild to realize that so many of the things we call "just who I am" are actually just habits we built to feel safe once upon a time. We spend so much energy trying to fix the person we think we are, but maybe the real work is just letting go of the patterns th
reply:
Facts, bro.

Most men aren’t meeting their real self.
They’re meeting survival patterns in a skin suit.

The shift happens when you stop trying to fix yourself and start dropping what was never you in the first place.

Powerful post, Lea.

reply:
Beautiful, Lea.

That shift is massive, brother. Or in your case, queen energy.

When it’s already done in your mind, the path stops feeling foggy and starts feeling inevitable. That’s where real power lives. Keep sitting in that frequency. You’re onto something big.
